comment: First science era: First Light to Service Mission #1
Service Mission #1 (SM1 - engineering).  SM1 tasks included: focus adjustment of Green camera; Reformatter adjustment to equalize SCI1 and SCI3 slices; Wide Flat fiber alignment.
Second science era: after Service Mission #1

Service Mission #2 (SM2 - engineering) which extended into on-sky science observations because of quasi-fixed pattern noise.  SM2 tasks included: installation of closed-cycle refridgerator (CCR) on Green cryostat (replacing LN2-based cooling); installation of thermal enclosure.
After a full Green-side warmup after a closed-cycle cooler pressure issue

Service Mission #3 (SM3 - engineering).  SM3 tasks included: installation of closed-cycle refridgerator on Red cryostat (replacing LN2-based cooling); extensive testing of the electical environment to assess and mitigate quasi-fixed pattern noise. The Green CCR continued to show signs of intermittent and reduced cooling capacity.
Third science era: after Service Mission #3 with quasi-fixed pattern noise reduced but still elevated at ~12 electons per CCD pixel.
